title: InfoHUD+
description: A beautiful F3 replacement — shows FPS, coordinates, GPU, CPU, RAM, biome, speed, ping and more on a clean customizable HUD.
body:
# InfoHUD+

  A lightweight, optimized F3 replacement that displays all the information you need on a clean, color-coded HUD.

  ## Why InfoHUD+?

  The default F3 screen is ugly and cluttered. InfoHUD+ replaces it with a minimal, beautiful overlay that shows only what you want.

  ## Information Displayed

  **Performance**
  - FPS counter
  - RAM usage (percentage + MB)
  - GPU name
  - CPU name
  - Java version

  **World**
  - XYZ coordinates
  - Facing direction + degrees
  - Biome name
  - Light level (block + sky)
  - Movement speed (blocks/sec)
  - Loaded chunks
  - Entity count

  **Server**
  - Ping (ms)
  - Player count
  - Server brand

  **Time**
  - In-game time
  - Day counter
  - Real-world clock

  ## Features

  - **Replaces F3** — press F3 to see your clean HUD instead of the vanilla debug screen
  - **Color-coded lines** — each info type has its own color for easy reading
  - **Every element toggleable** — show only what you need
  - **Dark background** — semi-transparent panel for readability
  - **4 anchor positions** — top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right
  - **Optimized** — data updates every 500ms, not every frame. Zero FPS impact
  - **GUI settings** — press Right Shift or use Mod Menu

  ## Keybinds

  | Key | Action |
  |-----|--------|
  | **F3** | Show/hide InfoHUD+ (replaces vanilla F3) |
  | **F6** | Toggle HUD on/off |
  | **Right Shift** | Open settings |

  All keybinds are rebindable in Controls settings.

  ## Supported Versions

  Fabric: 1.20 — 1.21.11, 26.1

  ## Requirements

  - Fabric Loader
  - Fabric API

  ## Optional

  - Mod Menu (for settings button)

  ## Client-Side Only

  No server mod needed. Works on any server.
